name: Aubrey
description: Sunny’s childhood friend. The sweet and strong-willed Aubrey stands up for her friends and is their constant state of morale.

name: Claude Faustus
nativeName: クロード・フォースタス
description: __Height__: 191 cm (6'3") __Race__: Demon The butler of the Trancy household. He is a demon and he has a line similar to that of Sebastian's, which is "私は旦那様を飽くまで貪りたい" (Watashi wa danna-sama wo akumade musaboritai) which means "I want to greedily devour you to the end, my master." The kanji of "akumade" might means something else. searchTerms: クロード・フォースタス

name: Kazane Aoba
description: She is a student at Setouchi Keijo Training School, a former resident of Room 309 and currently a member of the Elite Class. Upon graduating from Setouchi, Kazane officially becomes a B-Rank Keijo player, affiliated with the Chugoku's Hiroshima Branch. Sometime later, she is able to advance to the A-Rank.

name: Kazuya Hyoudou
description: The second son of Kazutaka Hyoudou, a spoiled child who loves gambling as much as his father. Having only been treated falsely throughout his entire life, by people who only wanted to use him for his money or pleased him to avoid retribution, Kazuya does not understand human bonds and believes that friendship and love are simply lies that will fall away at the last moment. He also seeks to become an acclaimed author, believing that, this way, he will get true acceptance and praise, not merely hu

name: Keigo Magami
description: __Height:__ 176 cm (5'9") Nico's classmate and self-proclaimed hipster. He was a figure skater until an accident forced him to retire. ~!He's actually a werewolf, and seeing any crescent shape brings out his other [personality](https://anilist.co/character/301197/).!~

name: Koga Oogami
description: __Unit:__ UNDEAD __Club:__ Light Music Club __Circles:__ Animals, BB A lone hunter whose purpose in life is rock. He hates a conservative approach. Although hot-blooded and short-tempered, Koga's pretty sensible. He goes all out in his flashy performances with a passionate, powerful voice. A member of Rhythm Link's UNDEAD. Despite his tough exterior, he actually cares deeply about the people around him (such as his fellow UNDEAD members and the Producer). He likes being depended on, and during t
mediaTitles: Last Period: the journey to the end of the despair

name: Makoto Sawatari
description: __Height:__ 159cm Makoto is a character from the Japanese visual novel Kanon. She is a young girl who attacked Yuuichi Aizawa out-of-the-blue in the middle of town early on in the story. She was then carried back to Yuuichi and Nayuki Minase's house, where she lived as a guest for the remainder of her story. Despite having lost her memories, she remembered what her name was and is sure of is that she holds a grudge against Yuuichi from the past when he visited the city back when he was younger.

name: Miku Kohinata
description: Hibiki's best friend, who shares a dorm with her and is often concerned for her safety. Miku is helpful and cheery, but constantly worries about Hibiki due to the danger she frequently finds herself in as a Symphogear user. She has a hidden possessive streak towards Hibiki, borne out of a desire not to see Hibiki get hurt; even so, Miku does all her best to support Hibiki and encourages her to fight for what she believes in and help others, even if it's born of selfish desire, and so Miku works

name: Minare Koda
description: Her day job consists of working at the soup curry restaurant Voyager, but she ends up becoming the host of the Moiwayama Radio Station's (MRS) late-night program Nami yo Kiite Kure. With compliments from Matou about her natural skill, and her voice able to whip people into an uproar, her ability becomes highly praised. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Mr. Popo
description: Mr. Popo is an immortal djinn who lives with Kami in Kami's Lookout and is bound there eternally as the gardener and caretaker. He has served every other Kami (God/Guardian) of the Earth since the beginning of time. He was trained by the recent Kami himself and trained Goku for 3 years in order to fight Piccolo.

name: Nanako Dojima
description: The young cousin of the Protagonist and Ryotaro's only daughter. Nanako is a very innocent character, but is usually left at home due to her father's work. Nanako is capable of taking care of herself and watches TV most of the time. She treats the Protagonist as an older brother and tries to do whatever she can to spend time with the family members. Nanako mostly talks about the afterlife and asks where good and bad people go. The Protagonist helps Nanako come to terms with her father's busy pro
mediaTitles: Persona 4 the Animation: No One is Alone

name: Ritsuka Fujimaru
description: Ritsuka Fujimaru is the protagonist of Fate/Grand Order, acting as the Master of many Servants for the purpose of solving the Grand Order conflicts. She has absolutely no background details or connections to other people or events. She is simply "someone who just happened to see a recruitment flyer at a station, applied and got accepted into the job, and somehow ended up getting taken into the Chaldea Security Organization.'' She is a rather mediocre magus with skills comparable to Lord El-Mello

name: Ronaldo
description: A vampire hunter in his 20s with a base of operations in Shin-Yokohama. Originally not thrilled to have [Draluc](https://anilist.co/character/195177/Draluc) as a roommate, the success of the partnership in his novel series, _The Ronaldo Chronicles_, leads him to reluctantly put up with the vampire. He frequently kills Draluc when annoyed. He also has an extreme phobia of celery.

name: Seitarou Higuchi
description: Originally introduced as a deity of matrimony in the first episode, Higuchi Seitarou (his full name given in episode four, though he is more commonly referred to simply as Master) appears to be an eighth year student at the university living in the same dorm as the protagonist. He always wears a yukata and has a wise, distant, nonchalant air about him. He often aids the protagonist most directly, though the protagonist may not see it that way.

name: Tier
description: **Race:** Angel Tier is one of the main characters of Isekai Nonbiri Nouka series. She is an angel with celestial magical powers and bird-like wings that allow her to fly. She is part of the Angel of Annihilation tribe, specializing in golem magic. Tier visits the forest in search of Loo, her frenemy, and ends up living there with Hiraku and Loo .

name: Azusa Azuki
description: Azusa is a second year high school student, a very popular girl known as an ojou-sama. She is always alone and turns down all confessions of love she receives. She likes animals. ~!It is later revealed that she just tries to look rich, going as far as working at two part-time jobs to buy expensive clothes and accessories. description: __Height:__ 166 cm (5'5") Emma Verde is one of thirteen members of the Nijigasaki High School Idol Club. She was a member of the original group and is a member of QU4RTZ, a unit under Nijigaku. She is a third year student and her image color is light green. Emma is from Switzerland and has eight younger siblings. She formerly attended the Y.G. International Academy. name: Jirou Ogasawara
description: Sasaki's classmate and friend, he's a bad boy. He shares the same music taste as Sasaki, has a girlfriend, wears an ear cuff, and has blue-dyed streaks in his hair.

name: Kakucho
description: One of the Tenjiku executives. Former childhood friend to [Takemichi Hanagaki](https://anilist.co/character/145342/Takemichi-Hanagaki), Kakucho, or Kaku for short, was very weak originally. ~!Kaku was nearly shot to death by [Tetta Kisaki](https://anilist.co/character/170483/Tetta-Kisaki), however [Izana Kurokawa](https://anilist.co/character/170484/Izana-Kurokawa) jumped in front of the bullets to save him.!~

name: Mashiro Kurata
description: __Height:__ 154 cm (5'1") A first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and the vocalist of the band Morfonica. Mashiro is a quiet and reserved girl. Though she aspired for Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and managed to get in, she was overwhelmed by the talented individuals around her. As a result, she felt depressed daily until she stumbled upon a band. She's also full of imagination and tends to get lost in her fantasies. (Source: BanG Dream! Wikia)
